columns.extraction_plan: The median progression-free survival in months for the overall treatment group is not explicitly reported in the provided PDF. Hazard Ratios for progression-free survival are mentioned in the text on page 11 and shown in Figure 4, but the median duration is not given.

The median progression-free survival in months for the overall control group is not explicitly reported in the provided PDF. Hazard Ratios for progression-free survival are mentioned in the text on page 11 and shown in Figure 4, but the median duration is not given.

The median progression-free survival in months for patients with high volume metastasis in the treatment group is not explicitly reported in the provided PDF. While subgroup analyses for high-volume disease are presented for overall survival (Figure 3E), and Hazard Ratios for progression-free survival are mentioned (page 11), the median PFS in months for this specific subgroup is not provided.
